items.title: Report: Chiefs' Kelce, Swift to marry at MSG Fri.
items.body_text: The star couple will have their wedding at Madison Square Garden on Friday night, according to a law enforcement official briefed on the security plans.
items.author: Associated Press

items.title: Calais Cambell's mother dead, brother charged
items.body_text: The brother of Ravens defensive lineman Calais Campbell has been charged with murder after police found their 71-year-old mother dead at a home in Atlanta during a welfare check.

items.title: Former Titans scout Taylor found guilty of murder
items.body_text: Blaise Taylor, a former defensive back at Arkansas State and NFL scout for the Titans, was found guilty of murdering his girlfriend and her unborn child Wednesday in a Nashville courtroom.

items.title: Sorsby won't sue NFL, will prepare for '27 draft
items.body_text: The NFL Players Association and Brendan Sorsby will not be pursuing litigation after the NFL's decision not to hold a supplemental draft this year, according to a memo sent to all 32 teams.

items.title: Lions release Arnold after CB's bond set at $1M
items.body_text: The Lions have released Terrion Arnold after he was arrested last week on felony charges of armed robbery and kidnapping, the team announced Monday.

items.title: Ex-Titans, Cards RB Johnson says he has ALS
items.body_text: Former Titans and Cardinals running back Chris Johnson told "Good Morning America" that he was diagnosed with ALS in 2025.

items.title: Judge Doty, who ruled on many NFL cases, dies
items.body_text: David Doty, the U.S. District Judge who directed numerous NFL labor matters in his Minneapolis courtroom and made a 1992 ruling that paved the way for modern free agency, has died at age 96.

items.title: Aiyuk blames ex-agent for causing 49ers issues
items.body_text: Brandon Aiyuk said in a YouTube video that his former agent has influenced the ongoing situation between him and 49ers and that general manager John Lynch recently showed up at his house.
